mapper.select:
SELECT #{projectId} as projectId,
-- UQS质量指标 (2个) AVG(d.uqs_score) as avgUQS,
(SELECT AVG(first_pass_rate) FROM spotter_efficiency.test_plan_metrics WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND start_time >= #{startTime} AND start_time <= #{endTime} ) as firstPassRate,
(SELECT AVG(first_pass_rate) FROM spotter_efficiency.test_plan_metrics WHERE 1=1 AND start_time >= #{startTime} AND start_time <= #{endTime} ) as firstPassRate,
-- 复杂度指标 (4个) - 基于CS分值 SUM(d.cs_score) as totalWriteComplexity, SUM(d.cs_score) as totalExecComplexity, AVG(d.cs_score) as avgComplexity, VARIANCE(d.cs_score) as complexityVariance,
-- 工时偏差指标 (2个) - 基于算法工时vs实测工时 ((SUM(d.platform_actual_write_ms) - SUM(d.algo_expected_write_ms)) / NULLIF(SUM(d.algo_expected_write_ms), 0)) * 100 as avgWriteTimeDeviation, 0 as avgExecTimeDeviation,
-- 复用降本指标 (3个) (SUM(CASE WHEN d.reuse_count > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / GREATEST(COUNT(*), 1)) * 100 as reuseRateByCount, (SUM(CASE WHEN d.reuse_count > 0 THEN d.cs_score ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(d.cs_score), 0)) * 100 as reuseRateByWorkload, SUM(CASE WHEN d.reuse_count > 0 THEN d.algo_expected_write_ms / 3600000.0 ELSE 0 END) as absoluteTimeSavings,
-- 变更热度指标 (2个) 0 as caseGrowthRate, SUM(CASE WHEN d.modify_count > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as caseChangeHeat,
-- 执行效率指标 (3个) 0 as avgCaseExecDuration, 0 as manualCaseExecHeat, NULL as topFrequentCasesRaw,
-- 统计数据 COUNT(*) as totalCaseCount
FROM spotter_efficiency.case_metrics_detail d WHERE 1=1
AND d.project_id = #{projectId}
AND d.create_user = #{userId}
AND d.create_time >= #{startTime}
AND d.create_time <= #{endTime}
